caption: A man wearing a light yellow, collared jacket is seated at a desk, speaking while facing slightly to his left. He is positioned in front of a backdrop that features a partial view of the South Korean flag. To his right is a black speaker, and a thin microphone on a black stand extends toward him. On-screen text in the upper left corner displays the logos "REUTERS" and "VOA 60 LEARNING ENGLISH." A caption at the bottom of the scene reads, "South Korea and Japan criticize the test,". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression and mouth movements shift slightly as he continues to speak. The background, equipment, and on-screen text remain static throughout the clip.
